entity.label: Abiezer
entity.subtitle: Male
entity.description: One of David’s thirty warriors (2 Sam. 23:27; comp. 1 Chr. 27:12).

nodes.label: Abiezer
nodes.description: One of David’s thirty warriors (2 Sam. 23:27; comp. 1 Chr. 27:12).

verses.text: Abiezer the Anethothite, Mebunnai the Hushathite,
Ira the son of Ikkesh the Tekoite, Abiezer the Antothite,
The ninth captain for the ninth month was Abiezer the Anetothite, of the Benjamites: and in his course were twenty and four thousand.
